validation_sites.name: Laurel Caverns
validation_sites.notes: Natural sinkhole entrance on hillside, building nearby but entrance exposed to sky

validation_sites.name: Tytoona Cave
validation_sites.notes: NSS-managed wild cave, natural stream entrance at cliff face, no structures

validation_sites.name: Harlansburg Cave
validation_sites.notes: Wild cave, one of longest in western PA, natural entrance in sinkhole with bat gate, no building

validation_sites.name: Allegheny Cemetery Cave
validation_sites.notes: Field-verified 2026-04-02. Bedding plane cave entrance in exposed Pittsburgh Formation sandstone/limestone, wooded unused section of Allegheny Cemetery, Lawrenceville. Associated sinkhole depression and root-throw nearby. Undocumented — no geological survey or cave registry entry exists.

validation_sites.name: Centralia
validation_sites.notes: Underground mine fire since 1962. Visible surface subsidence, open fissures, vents. LiDAR sees ground deformation clearly.

validation_sites.name: Organ Cave
validation_sites.notes: Large natural walk-in entrance at base of hillside, no building over it. One of longest caves in WV.

validation_sites.name: McClung Cave
validation_sites.notes: Wild cave, natural stream-level entrance in cliff, no commercial development

validation_sites.name: Friars Hole
validation_sites.notes: Wild cave system, multiple natural entrances in sinkholes and hillsides, no development

validation_sites.name: Bat Cave NC
validation_sites.notes: Nature Conservancy property, large natural cliff face entrance, no structures

validation_sites.name: Ray Mica Mine
validation_sites.notes: Historic mica mine on forest land, exposed open-cut workings and adit entrances

validation_sites.name: Davis Pyrite Mine
validation_sites.notes: Historic abandoned pyrite mine in Rowe, exposed adit entrance in hillside, no covering structure

validation_sites.name: Bayou Corne Sinkhole
validation_sites.notes: Massive ~35 acre open sinkhole from 2012 salt dome collapse, enormous terrain depression visible in any LiDAR

validation_sites.name: Lava Beds NM Valentine Cave
validation_sites.notes: NPS lava tube with natural collapse entrance — open hole in lava field, no building, just stairs down
